name: Animated Modal
summary: A polished modal dialog component with smooth entrance and exit animations, backdrop blur effects, and customizable content areas for focused user interactions.
detailedDescription: The Animated Modal component provides a sophisticated dialog solution that combines functional overlay behavior with elegant motion design. This component creates focused interaction contexts by dimming and blurring the background while smoothly animating the modal content into view. The entrance animation typically combines scale, opacity, and subtle rotation transforms to create a natural, organic appearance that feels less mechanical than simple fade-ins. The backdrop features an optional blur effect that adds visual depth and helps separate the modal from underlying content, improving focus and readability. Exit animations are equally refined, ensuring the modal doesn't simply disappear but transitions out smoothly to maintain visual continuity. The component includes proper focus trapping for accessibility, keyboard navigation support with Escape key dismissal, and click-outside-to-close functionality. Content areas are fully customizable, supporting headers, body content, footers with action buttons, and close buttons. Perfect for confirmation dialogs, forms, detailed content views, notifications, or any context requiring focused user attention without page navigation. The modal is responsive and adjusts sizing appropriately for different screen sizes, with optional mobile-specific behaviors like full-screen display on smaller devices.
purpose: Create focused interaction contexts that demand user attention without navigation
Present confirmation dialogs, forms, or detailed content in an overlay format
Maintain page context while allowing temporary focused interactions
Provide accessible dialog functionality with proper focus management
Enhance UX with smooth, polished animations that feel premium and intentional
behavior: Animates into view with configurable scale, opacity, and rotation transforms
Applies backdrop blur and opacity to de-emphasize background content
Traps keyboard focus within modal for accessibility compliance
Supports keyboard navigation with Escape key to dismiss
Detects clicks outside modal area to trigger dismissal
Animates out smoothly on close to maintain visual continuity
Optionally prevents body scroll while modal is open
Adjusts sizing and positioning responsively for different screen sizes
visualCharacteristics: Smooth entrance and exit animations with natural easing curves
Backdrop blur creating depth separation from background content
Clean, focused appearance with clear visual hierarchy
Customizable sizing from compact dialogs to large content areas
Professional, polished aesthetic suitable for any application context
Responsive design adapting to mobile and desktop contexts appropriately
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
